behavior_summary: Implements the runtime behavior of a pressure plate item: when stepped on (U8P_PLATE::gotHit) it updates the plate's visual state (frame), inspects encoded configuration bits (quality), and either toggles local frame only, or initiates multi-step operations that drive connected stairs and sliders.

Placing the plate into a 'busy' multi-step state spawns a short-lived helper (PLATE::0411) and one or more worker scripts (STAIR/SLIDER variants) that animate or change nearby tiles/items; the helper finalizes propagation, sets related item qualities, and accumulates a global intelligence/score in some cases.
A release handler resets the plate frame when surface weight falls to zero so the plate can unpress when nothing is standing on it.
notable_control_flow: Entry checks Item::getFrame to ignore repeated presses when already in frame==1, otherwise sets frame to 1 and continues.
Reads Item::getQuality and splits it into low-byte 'type/flags' and high-byte 'index/parameter' to select one of several behavior paths.
Conditional branches based on quality low-byte bits (notably 0x01 and 0x02) determine whether to scan neighborhood for stairs, scan for sliders, or only play an SFX and spawn the lightweight helper.

Before starting multi-tile operations the routine checks global hanoiBusy; if not busy it sets hanoiBusy and (in some branches) updates hanoiStairDown, then spawns worker scripts and PLATE::0411; if busy it may play a busy SFX instead.

Neighborhood scans use Item::getX/Item::getY and Item::getFootpad to validate candidate targets by coordinate offsets before spawning corresponding STAIR/SLIDER scripts or writing quality to matched items.
open_questions: Exact encoding and meaning of the high byte of quality (quality_high) used as an index/parameter for target selection: which numeric range maps to which neighbor offsets?
Precise identities and parameter encoding of some spawned worker script IDs (several STAIR/SLIDER variants are invoked; their internal differences are inferred but not enumerated).
Full semantics of AccumulateIntelligence and when/why score increments occur in game design terms (only inferred from helper behavior).
Exact conditions under which hanoiStairBlocked prevents propagation and how that interacts with multiple simultaneous plates.

main_function.name: U8P_PLATE::gotHit
main_function.purpose: Respond to a pressure-plate being stepped on: set the plate to pressed, interpret configuration encoded in the item quality, and either perform a local SFX/frame toggle or coordinate a multi-tile operation by spawning helper and worker scripts to move/alter stairs/sliders.
entry_conditions: Called on the 'U8P_PLATE::gotHit' event (Event 6) when an actor steps on or otherwise hits the plate.
Behavior is driven by the plate item's current frame and the plate's quality bytes.

function_map.name: U8P_PLATE::gotHit
function_map.role: Primary event handler reacting to plate activation; orchestrates frame updates, scans, global-flag gating, and spawning of helper/worker scripts.

function_map.name: U8P_PLATE::release
function_map.role: Release event handler (Event 9) that resets the plate frame from 1 to 0 if nothing remains on the surface (surface weight == 0).

function_map.name: U8P_PLATE::0411
function_map.role: Short-lived spawned helper that finalizes propagation: sets an internal state byte, scans for connected items by quality, spawns SLIDER worker scripts or writes back quality bytes, and increments an intelligence/score counter when relevant; respects hanoiStairBlocked.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Query an item's current visual/interaction frame; used to detect pressed/unpressed state.

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Set an item's frame to reflect state changes (e.g., pressed).

function_map.name: Item::getQuality
function_map.role: Read the item's quality word encoding configuration flags and parameters.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Return item's X coordinate for neighborhood scans.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Return item's Y coordinate for neighborhood scans.

function_map.name: Item::getFootpad
function_map.role: Provide footpad/anchor offsets used to validate and compute spawn parameters for adjacent stairs/sliders.

function_map.name: U8P_PLATE::playSFX
function_map.role: Play a sound effect for feedback (successful press, busy/failure indication).

function_map.name: spawn
function_map.role: Spawn helper/worker scripts asynchronously (used to start PLATE::0411, STAIR and SLIDER worker scripts).

function_map.name: Item::getSurfaceWeight
function_map.role: Return weight currently on plate surface; used by release to determine whether to reset frame.

function_map.name: Item::setQuality
function_map.role: Write back quality bytes into related items (used by helper propagation).

function_map.name: AccumulateIntelligence
function_map.role: Increment a global/aggregate intelligence or score counter when certain configurations are found (inferred).

internal_calls.purpose: Offload longer/multi-step propagation and finalization to a spawned helper so U8P_PLATE::gotHit can finish quickly and asynchronous propagation can run; helper also clears hanoiBusy when done.
No direct evidence of release being called by 0411; both are related event handlers for plate lifecycle (listed as internal helpers).

external_calls.purpose: Check whether the plate is already in the pressed frame to avoid redundant activation.
Set the plate's frame to pressed (frame=1) when activated.
Read plate configuration (flags and index) to decide which operation path to follow.
Obtain X coordinate for tile/item neighborhood scans to find targets.
Obtain Y coordinate for tile/item neighborhood scans to find targets.
Get footpad offsets of candidate tiles/items to validate and compute spawn parameters for STAIR/SLIDER workers.
Start PLATE::0411 and STAIR/SLIDER worker scripts to animate or change connected tiles asynchronously.
Provide audible feedback on success/failure or when an operation is blocked by hanoiBusy.
Decide whether the plate should reset frame to unpressed when actors step off.
Propagate or record state into related items found during helper scanning.
Spawn SLIDER worker scripts for connected slider targets during finalization.
Increment a game-level intelligence/score counter when certain configurations are found (inferred from helper behavior).

reads.name: hanoiBusy
reads.likely_effect: Checked to prevent starting overlapping multi-tile plate operations; read to choose a 'busy' branch versus initiating work.

reads.name: hanoiStairDown
reads.likely_effect: Read to determine which stair-spawn variant/direction to use when operating stairs.

reads.name: hanoiStairBlocked
reads.likely_effect: Read by PLATE::0411 to block or alter propagation to connected stairs/sliders.

writes.name: hanoiBusy
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when beginning a coordinated multi-tile operation to prevent re-entrance; cleared later by helper.

writes.name: hanoiStairDown
writes.likely_effect: Updated when plate logic determines a stair-down preference so spawned STAIR scripts behave consistently.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements the runtime behavior of a pressure plate item: when stepped on (U8P_PLATE::gotHit) it updates the plate's visual state (frame), inspects encoded configuration bits (quality), and either toggles local frame only, or initiates multi-step operations that drive connected stairs and sliders.
